## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between GrowthX and Viscom for content strategy and growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Viscom is a design tool for concept artists and industrial designers, balancing PLG and SLG motions](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Current focus areas: benchmarking growth, developing content strategy, and refining vertical conviction](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Significant opportunities exist in repurposing existing content, expanding digital presence, and leveraging user-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [GrowthX proposed an 8-week strategy sprint to kickstart initiatives, with a potential start date in early August](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)

## Topics

### Viscom Overview and Current Challenges

  - [Design tool for concept artists and industrial designers, from sketch to render](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Balancing PLG (Product-Led Growth) and SLG (Sales-Led Growth) motions](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Polarized opinions on AI adoption in the design space](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Need to gain better understanding of true growth benchmarks](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Desire to develop intentional content strategy for better discoverability](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)

### Growth Opportunities

  - [Improve content strategy for better indexing and discoverability](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Leverage existing high-quality video content for broader reach](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Tap into user-generated content and community engagement](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Explore vertical-specific content and marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Utilize programmatic editorial approach to own key topics and definitions](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)

### GrowthX Capabilities and Proposed Collaboration

  - [Comprehensive discovery process and persona mapping](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Topic discovery and content repurposing workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Custom knowledge base creation for enriching content](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Programmatic editorial approach for scaling high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Experience with domain migrations and SEO considerations](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Potential for newsletter strategy using platforms like Beehive](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)

### Viscom's Current Assets and Initiatives

  - [Strong partnerships with thought leaders in the design space](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [High-quality video content and editorial pieces](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Vibrant education and curriculum program](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Recent successful events (e.g., Milan Design Week partnership)](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Large engaged email subscriber base (680,000+ active subscribers)](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)

### Timeline and Next Steps

  - [Viscom currently working on visual branding (3 weeks) and website sprint (1-2 months)](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=2357.0)
  - [Potential kickoff for GrowthX collaboration in early August](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [8-week strategy sprint proposed, with weeks 1-2 being most critical](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1918.0)
  - [Consideration for Viscom team's availability (Paris trip from Sept 8-23)](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=2833.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send detailed proposal and AP commitment information](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=3164.0)
  - [Viscom to confirm budget and timeline with internal finance team](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=3170.0)
  - [Schedule kickoff meeting for early August, if possible](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=3193.0)
  - [Explore potential for starting content publication sooner to build domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Discuss migration from current platform (Praver) to Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=3037.0)
  - [Set up introductions to Viscom's internal experts for GrowthX interviews](https://fathom.video/share/Gy8BUDf_Vk-7gzUpF_5yt-UmGpjUxtMn?tab=summary&timestamp=3220.0)
